question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to Settings > Security > Reset Password. You'll receive a reset link via email within 5 minutes.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.

question: How do I upgrade my plan?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. You can upgrade immediately and the prorated difference will be charged to your card on file.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to 40+ countries. International shipping takes 7-14 business days. Note: EU region is currently experiencing 3-5 day delays.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: Email support@acmecorp.com, use the in-app chat, or call 1-800-ACME-HELP (Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST).
